title: Ceramic Blue Tile
description: This tile features a deep, captivating blue glaze that adds a splash of vibrant color to any space. The premium ceramic construction ensures durability, while the high-gloss finish reflects light beautifully, making it an excellent choice for modern bathrooms or as a focal point in a contemporary kitchen. Its 60x60 cm dimensions offer a seamless look with fewer grout lines.

title: Carrara White Marble
description: Nothing says luxury like authentic Italian Carrara marble. Each 30x60 cm slab is unique, showcasing the natural, soft grey veining that has made this stone a staple of high-end architecture for centuries. It is the perfect choice for those looking to create a sophisticated, spa-like atmosphere in a primary suite or an elegant entryway.

title: Terracotta Rustic Square
description: Embrace the warmth of traditional craftsmanship with these unglazed clay tiles. The earthy, reddish-orange tones provide a rustic, Mediterranean feel that is perfect for sunrooms, farmhouse-style kitchens, or covered patios. Because they are unglazed, they offer a tactile, natural texture that feels grounded and authentic.

title: Matte Slate Grey
description: Combining the rugged look of natural slate with the superior strength of porcelain, this tile is built for high-traffic areas. The matte, textured surface provides excellent slip resistance, while the large-format 60x120 cm size gives floors a grand, expansive appearance. It is ideal for industrial-chic lofts or modern commercial spaces.

title: Emerald Glass Mosaic
description: Designed to catch and refract light, these small glass mosaic tiles feature a rich emerald green hue. They are specifically crafted for vertical surfaces like kitchen backsplashes or shower niches. The shimmering finish adds a jewel-like quality to the room, turning a functional wall into a piece of art.

title: Oak Wood-Look Plank
description: Get the timeless beauty of hardwood with the maintenance-free benefits of porcelain. Using high-definition printing technology, these 20x120 cm planks replicate the intricate grain and knots of natural oak. Unlike real wood, these are completely water-resistant, making them perfect for wood floors in bathrooms and basements.

title: Silver Travertine
description: Travertine is a celebrated natural stone known for its characteristic porous texture and tonal depth. This Silver variant offers a palette of cool greys and warm beiges. The surface is professionally honed and filled to provide a smooth, flat finish that remains incredibly durable, making it a classic choice for indoor flooring.

title: Polished Onyx Gold
description: The pinnacle of opulence, this onyx-style tile features translucent-looking layers and dramatic gold striking. The high-gloss polished finish enhances the depth of the stone's pattern, creating a glowing effect under ambient lighting. It is a statement piece designed for luxury feature walls or low-traffic formal areas.

title: Geometric Cement Tile
description: Handmade and full of character, these encaustic cement tiles feature a bold monochrome geometric pattern. Each 20x20 cm tile contributes to a repeating design that brings a boutique hotel vibe to laundry rooms, entryways, or cafes. The matte finish is soft to the touch yet sturdy enough for daily wear.

title: Sandstone Outdoor Slab
description: Engineered specifically for the elements, this extra-thick porcelain slab mimics the organic look of sandstone. It features a specialized anti-slip coating, ensuring safety for garden paths, poolside decks, and outdoor walkways. It is resistant to frost, fading, and heavy foot traffic, making it a permanent solution for landscaping.

title: Hexagon Matte Black
description: Break away from traditional squares with the trendy hexagonal format. The matte black finish offers a bold, moody aesthetic that pairs perfectly with brass or gold fixtures. These are particularly popular for creating high-contrast honeycomb floor patterns in modern bathrooms or laundry rooms.

title: Subway Glossy Cream
description: A softer take on the traditional white subway tile, this glossy cream version provides a timeless and versatile backdrop. The 10x30 cm rectangular shape allows for various installation patterns, such as herringbone or offset brick. Its reflective surface is easy to clean, making it a practical and stylish choice for kitchen walls.
